profile: Otherworld UR Guard, a pure team-protector. Her Ultimate Radiant Barrier puts the whole team into a Damage-Share state, Divine Light Blessing heals off her Max HP, and her nodes stack Final DMG RED, Effect/Crit Resist and HP-scaling team heals. She deals almost no direct damage, never crits, never relies on basic attacks. She wants survivability (HP, Final DMG RED, dmg-reduction), Damage-Share synergy, team sustain/shields and Effect Resist; every personal crit / basic-attack / ultimate / single-target / AOE / DoT scaler is dead weight on her.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Her own mirror; Final DMG RED + Healed Boost (and 5★ True/DoT reduction) while in Damage-Share, the state her Ult always creates. Near-100% uptime.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Damage-Share rider: bonus Final DMG + Effect Resist, and at 5★ blocks 3 negative effects/turn. She lives in Damage-Share, so always on.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED +12%→30%, unconditional. Best raw mitigation stat for a damage-soaking tank.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Unconditional Final DMG RED +5%→15%; effectively a second Frostglow.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: HP +5%→15%; her heals, shared-damage soak and team heals all scale off her Max HP — triple-dip.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED that ramps per hit taken (up to +45%); she's constantly attacked via Damage-Share, so it stacks fast.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP% + Healing Received as HP drops; HP she wants plus amplifies all her heals.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Caps the big shared hits (reduces the excess of large-HP hits); strong anti-burst for the damage sink.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: Self-heal of lost HP at turn end unlocks at 3★; needs a shield source active (e.g. Mystic Bull). Below 3★ it's just ATK/DEF, weak.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: HP +2%→5%; same HP-multiplier logic as Albert at smaller scale, cheap on-theme filler.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED per HP lost (up to +20%) is useful; the Final-DMG half is wasted and it needs her low.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team shield = 5%→20% of her Max HP; scales off her HP and enables Titan Strength.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: On-death team Spirit Shield; 3★ adds a second target. Death-gated insurance.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive keeps the team's damage-sink alive; the payoff (40% + regen) lands at 5★.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist +5%→15%; stacks with her anti-CC theme to keep the barrier up.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + a big turn-start burst (fades on action); anti-CC value.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: DEF +2%→5%; minor on-role mitigation.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED; small but on-theme survivability against crit-heavy enemies.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED +2%→5%; a weaker Garvin, cheap filler.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counter True DMG from DEF pings often (she's attacked a lot) but her DEF is low, so output is negligible.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP% is good; lethal-hit AOE + ATK/DEF stacks at 3★, but the burst clause is once-per-fight panic value.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: +Heal; amplifies her heals but she has no large heal skill to magnify.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Turn-start lost-HP recovery; generic self-sustain, unremarkable.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: Support DMG-reduction would suit her survivability theme, but this mirror's effect data is incomplete (newest, not yet on most servers).

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Counter-applies Bleed when attacked; it triggers but she relies on no DoT and it doesn't protect the team.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Counter-applies Infect when attacked; off her protect-the-team win condition.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP% is fine but the DMG-when-HP-higher rider is wasted on a non-attacker.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate does nothing — she lands no debuffs.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist on buff-loss; conditional and weaker than flat Effect-Resist mirrors.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore — pure offense, she deals almost no direct damage.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: ATK% — irrelevant to a non-attacker.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Final DMG% — wasted, she barely deals direct damage.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Final DMG% personal scaler — dead on her.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Final DMG bonus that decays per attack / resets on kill — she doesn't deal or kill.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Repeat-attack DMG stacking — she doesn't repeat-attack for damage.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Final DMG on attack / basic-atk — she lacks the attack cadence to use it.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-attack DMG + on-kill re-attack; she barely basic-attacks and doesn't kill.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: BATK DMG + basic-atk crit — no basic-attack or crit kit.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic-attack True DMG + on-crit — she neither basic-attacks much nor crits.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate-DMG + basic-attack scaling; her Ult deals no damage and she rarely basic-attacks.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate — no crit in her kit.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG — she never crits.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit Rate/DMG + on-crit dispel — no crit sources.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Crit / Final-DMG hunter stacks on no-kill turns — non-crit, non-killer.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: On-ally-death crit / Final-DMG burst — useless without crit or damage.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: On Feat-crit True DMG / Spirit Armor — her Feat doesn't crit-attack.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On-crit healing-reduction — she lands no crits.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG% — her Ultimate is a non-damaging barrier.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG — no single-target attack skill.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-attack execute scaling — she has no such attack.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs debuffed enemies — she barely attacks.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: ATK DMG vs controlled enemies — no offensive kit.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-skill True DMG per debuff — no single-target damage skill.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Skill True DMG vs [Infect] — she applies no Infect and casts no damage skill.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True-DMG stacking on her attacks — she deals almost none.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All-attacks bonus True DMG — negligible without an attack cadence.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: AOE attack DMG — she has no AOE damage skill.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AOE-skill True DMG rider — no AOE damage skill (the barrier is non-damaging).

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Passive AOE-attack True DMG — no AOE attack to trigger it.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG vs [Shield] — pure offense she can't use.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per buff on self — an offense scaler on a non-attacker.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG vs Damage-Share/Transfer targets — offense she doesn't deal.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Extra [Bleed] on apply — she applies no Bleed.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Extra [Infect] on apply — she applies no Infect.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: [Fox Fire] on active attack — she doesn't actively attack to apply it.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: True DMG vs DoT targets + Torment — she applies no DoT and deals no attack damage.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG + [Lethal] on dealing damage — she rarely deals damage to apply it.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Basic-attack + ultimate-damage scaler with a 3★ attack-chain — dead on a non-attacking protector.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-heal-skill boost — her healing is AOE/passive off Max HP, not single-target heal skills.
